suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 state creation cost repricing: resolution and DevNet-3 readiness
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-3 has been blocked since March 12 due to EIP-8037 implementation complexity and alignment issues with EIP-7928. A repricing breakout was scheduled for March 19 to resolve gas accounting complexity, but no confirmation of resolution appears in ACDE #233. This is blocking devnet progress.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-3 launch status and revised timeline
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-3 was originally planned for early March, then blocked by EIP-8037 implementation gaps. Most clients reported not being ready as of March 12. Need status update on client readiness and new launch target.

suggestions.topic: Gas repricing implementation progress: 18 operations baseline and EIP-7976 status
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #233 identified 18 operations needing repricing to achieve 60 Mgas/s baseline. EIP-7976 (call data gas increase to 64) enables 670M gas blocks but implementation status across clients is unclear. Need progress check before devnet inclusion.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8070 Sparse Mempool: client feedback and CFI viability
suggestions.rationale: CFI'd in ACDE #233 with Geth prototype complete. Action item assigned for all client teams to review complexity assessment. Need feedback to determine if it should remain CFI or be descoped.

suggestions.topic: Frame transactions (EIP-8141) implementation roadmap as non-headliner
suggestions.rationale: CFI'd for Hegotá as non-headliner in ACDE #233 after rejection as headliner. Mempool doc published with Strategy 2 recommended. Need clarity on implementation timeline, testing plan, and which clients are committing to implement.

suggestions.topic: ePBS DevNet-0 relaunch with PTSC changes post-withdrawal fixes
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-0 was broken by withdrawals as of ACDE #233, with relaunch planned including PTSC changes. Need status update on fixes and relaunch timeline, especially given FOCIL is now CFI'd for Hegotá.

suggestions.topic: Hegotá fork scope finalization and devnet consolidation strategy
suggestions.rationale: With headliner decision complete (no headliner, FOCIL + AA theme), need to finalize full Hegotá scope (CFI → Included transitions) and plan devnet consolidation strategy across bal-devnet-3+, epbs-devnet, and potential integration testing.

suggestions.topic: Scheme transactions (EIP-8XXX) presentation as alternative AA approach
suggestions.rationale: Mentioned in ACDE #233 as simpler AA alternative to Frame transactions. If still under consideration for Hegotá or I-Star, community may want initial presentation and discussion.
